site.name: C&C
site.type: multilingual marketing site with direct booking flows

notes: WebMCP is a progressive enhancement on top of the human booking UI.
A visible browser context is required; the booking tools are not headless-only APIs.
Admin flows are intentionally not exposed as public WebMCP tools.

declarativeTools.name: start_parking_reservation_checkout
declarativeTools.purpose: Prepare a direct parking reservation and send the traveller to payment.

imperativeTools.name: check_parking_availability
imperativeTools.purpose: Check whether a parking stay is available for a given date range.

imperativeTools.name: quote_parking_stay
imperativeTools.purpose: Calculate a direct-booking quote for the parking space.

declarativeTools.name: start_studio_reservation_checkout
declarativeTools.purpose: Prepare a direct studio reservation and send the traveller to payment.

imperativeTools.name: check_studio_availability
imperativeTools.purpose: Check whether the eco studio is available for a given date range.

imperativeTools.name: quote_studio_stay
imperativeTools.purpose: Calculate a direct-booking quote for the eco studio.

declarativeTools.name: update_existing_reservation
declarativeTools.purpose: Update an existing reservation with new dates or options.
